members.label: cabinet
members.description: dark wood kitchen cabinets along back wall
members.long_form_open_description: Row of tall, dark-stained kitchen cabinets and overhead units lining the back wall of the kitchen. Stainless appliances are integrated among cabinets; cabinets have modern hardware and a continuous run across the rear wall.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Above and around oven/refrigerator; behind the kitchen island
